Pytest fixture to create a HarvestedCrop instance for testing.

An instance of the HarvestedCrop class.

Pytest fixture to create a FeedManager instance for testing.

RufasTime fixture for testing.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_feed_manager_init(mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test that Feed Manager is initialized correctly.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_available_feeds(feed_manager: FeedManager, mock_available_feeds: list[Feed]) → None

Test for FeedManager available_feeds property.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_update_available_feed_amounts(feed_manager: FeedManager, mock_available_feeds: list[Feed], mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test that amounts of available feeds in Feed Manager are updated correctly.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_translate_crop_config_name_to_rufas_id(feed_manager: FeedManager, mock_available_feeds: list[Feed], mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test that crop config names are correctly translated to RuFaS IDs.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_receive_crop_success(feed_manager: FeedManager, harvested_crop: HarvestedCrop) → None

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_process_degradations(feed_manager: FeedManager, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Tests process_degradations in the FeedManager.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_give_feed(feed_manager: FeedManager) → None

Tests give_feed in the FeedManager.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_execute_daily_routines(feed_manager: FeedManager, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test that the Feed Manager’s daily routine is executed correctly.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_report_stored_feeds(feed_manager: FeedManager, mock_available_feeds: list[Feed], mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test that the Feed Manager reports stored feeds correctly.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_manage_daily_feed_request(feed_manager: FeedManager, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test that the daily request for feed is executed correctly.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_manage_daily_feed_request_unfulfillable(feed_manager: FeedManager, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test that the daily request for feed is executed correctly when the request is unfulfillable.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_get_total_inventory(feed_manager: FeedManager, mock_available_feeds: list[Feed], mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test that the total inventory is collected correctly.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_get_total_inventory_zero_day_in_the_future(feed_manager: FeedManager, mock_available_feeds: list[Feed], mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test that the total inventory is collected correctly when the requested inventory date is the current date.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_get_total_inventory_value_error(feed_manager: FeedManager, mock_available_feeds: list[Feed]) → None

Test that get_total_inventory correctly raises a ValueError when the inventory_date is in the past.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_manage_planning_cycle_purchases(feed_manager: FeedManager, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test that requests for feed made at beginning of a planning cycle are handled correctly.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_manage_ration_interval_purchases(feed_manager: FeedManager, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test that requests for feed made at beginning of a ration interval are handled correctly.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_query_available_feed_totals(feed_manager: FeedManager, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test that totals of available feeds are calculated correctly.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_query_available_feed_totals_no_stored_crops_input(feed_manager: FeedManager, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test that totals of available feeds are calculated correctly when user did not specify the stored_crops input.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_query_available_feeds_no_parameters(feed_manager: FeedManager, alfalfa_crop: HarvestedCrop, corn_crop: HarvestedCrop) → None

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_purchase_feed(feed_manager: FeedManager, mock_available_feeds: list[Feed], mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test that feeds are purchased correctly.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_purchase_feed_error(feed_manager: FeedManager, mock_available_feeds: list[Feed], mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test that trying to purchase an unavailable feed raises an error.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_store_purchsed_feed(feed_manager: FeedManager, time: RufasTime, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test that purchased feeds are stored correctly.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_deduct_feeds_from_inventory(feed_manager: FeedManager, harvested_crop: HarvestedCrop, purchased_feed: PurchasedFeed, grown_amount: float, grown_date: date, purchased_amount: float, purchased_date: date, expected_grown: float, expected_purchased: float) → None

Test that feeds are removed correctly from inventory.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_deduct_feeds_from_inventory_error(feed_manager: FeedManager, harvested_crop: HarvestedCrop) → None

Test that an error is raised correctly when too much feed is deducted from inventory.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_select_rufas_id_for_harvested_crop(feed_manager: FeedManager, crop_ids: list[int], feed_ids: list[int], expected: int | None) → None

Test that a HarvestedCrop is correctly mapped to a RuFaS ID.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_setup_available_feeds(feed_manager: FeedManager, mocker: MockerFixture, standard: NutrientStandard, feed_rep: type[NASEMFeed] | type[NRCFeed]) → None

Test that the available feeds are setup correctly.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_setup_available_feeds_error(feed_manager: FeedManager, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test that an error is thrown when a non-existent feed is listed.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_process_feed_library(feed_manager: FeedManager, mocker: MockerFixture, standard: NutrientStandard, expected: str) → None

Test that the feed library is processed correctly.

tests.test_biophysical.test_feed_storage.test_feed_manager.test_setup_stored_feeds(feeds_info: dict[str, dict[str, str | float]], expected_feeds_info: dict[str, dict[str, float | CropCategory | CropType | date]], feed_manager: FeedManager, mocker: MockerFixture) → None
